title: Create: Metal Pipe
description: replaces the cardboard sword with a metal pipe
body:
[![hosting ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d4ccf68084d5bcd931ec540bbe8cbcc4e51c16.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/axolotl-man)



this very amazing and cool resource pack replaces the new cardboard sword that was added in create 6.0.0 to a metal pipe with a new texture (made by TheTntExpress) and the famous sound from the meme as well as changing the name of the item
